title: Team Chat
description: Team Chat lets you create and join teams and chat with your teammates in-game. It connects to the Team Chat server to keep everything synced. More features will be added over time.
body:
# Team Chat

## ⚠️ IMPORTANT — READ FIRST
Team Chat **REQUIRES Discord** for additional functions, support and help.

If you do not join the discord you'll be locked in Guest mode which means you don't have an account but can still talk with other guest and user that join that team.

- The **ONLY** way to get more functions, support and help for this mod is by joining our official Discord.
- We **DO NOT** ask for emails, verification codes, or passwords.
- If **anyone** asks for your email, verification code, or account info claiming to be Team Chat — **DO NOT TRUST THEM**.
- Registration happens **only** through Discord commands.

Join the official Discord here:
https://discord.com/invite/Eqxz9p48nm

---

A lightweight **client-side** mod that allows **private messaging across servers** — backed by our hosted Team Chat server and **Discord**.

This mod lets you:
- Message teammates **even if they are on a different Minecraft server**
- Communicate **directly between players** without relying on in-game proximity or server chat
- Stay connected with your team regardless of where they are playing

> **Requirement:** You must be in our Discord to use Team Chat.

## What This Mod Is
Team Chat is **NOT** local chat and **NOT** server chat.

- Messages are sent through the Team Chat server
- Works across **different servers**, **different worlds**, and **different locations**
- Ideal for teams, friends, and groups playing separately

## Features
- **Client-only** mod.
- Custom teams with join codes.
- Create up to **5** teams; join **unlimited** teams *(for now)*.
- Per-user **labels** for teams (example: “Team 1”, “Raid”).
- Session controls:
  - **away**
  - **leave**
  - **switch**
  - **return**
  - **disband** *(leader-only)*
- Local authentication:
  - **token**
  - optional **pin**
  - stored locally on your PC
- **Commands available** for:
  - connection
  - authentication
  - team management
  - messaging

## Limits & Notes
- Team names and labels are **max 32 characters**.
- Labels are **per-user** — only **you** see them.
- Messages are real-time only.
- Discord messages sent to clients have **new lines removed** for safety/consistency.

Get the mod here:
https://modrinth.com/mod/team-chat

## Security Notes
- We will **never** DM you asking for private information.
- Tokens and pins are generated via Discord commands only.
- Allowing Discord DMs is optional — you’ll still receive your token either way.
- Report suspicious behavior to staff immediately.

## Roadmap
GUI for teams & chat  
Friends system  
More customization  
Additional safety & moderation tools  

🚧 Features are actively being developed — feedback is welcome.
